cold_start: under 100 ms (hello-world); few hundred ms (larger apps)
name: Deno Sandbox
notes: Ephemeral microVMs with persistent volumes. Public docs do not document RAM snapshot or pause-resume behavior, and do not spell out paused-state billing.
pricing_model: Resource-time billing (CPU time and memory time) with additional sandbox charges
summary: Deno Sandbox provides isolated Linux microVMs (Firecracker-based) on Deno Deploy that developers control via an SDK to run code such as AI agent workloads. Sandboxes are ephemeral by default with persistent volumes for durable storage, and have documented resource and lifetime limits.
